degree: MS in Data Science, Analytics and Engineering
work_authorization_note: Eligible for OPT. Open to sponsorship.

work_experience.title: Project Trainee
bullets: Analyzed painting-line defect data to identify bottlenecks and process issues in daily production.
Built visualization reports for leadership, supporting corrective actions that reduced rework by approximately 3-5%.

projects.name: Macro-Equity Analytics Dashboard

metrics.data_history: 20+ years of Federal Reserve macro data
metrics.datasets: FRED macro + S&P 500 equity data combined

bullets: Building end-to-end macroeconomic analytics dashboard ingesting 20+ years of FRED data across 10+ indicators including Fed Funds Rate, CPI, unemployment, GDP, and the 10Y-2Y yield spread alongside S&P 500 equity history.
Implementing anomaly detection to flag macro-driven market dislocations across historical events including the 2008 crisis, COVID crash, and 2022 rate hike cycle.
Engineering modern data stack using Polars for fast dataframe processing, DuckDB for sub-second SQL queries, FastAPI for the backend API, and React deployed on Vercel for the live frontend.

projects.name: Auto-Apply Agent
bullets: Building an agentic AI system to automate the end-to-end job application workflow using LLM-driven decision making and multi-step orchestration.
Designing the agent pipeline to handle job discovery, resume tailoring, and application submission with minimal human intervention.
Applying LangGraph for stateful agent orchestration and multi-step task execution across dynamic job application flows.

projects.name: Smart Parking Management System
bullets: Designing a full-stack smart parking system using Computer Vision for automated license plate recognition, eliminating manual plate entry for accessibility.
Building production-grade SaaS infrastructure with Supabase for real-time session and occupancy data, Stripe for payment processing, and Clerk for lot manager authentication.
Architecting an accessibility-first React frontend optimized for elderly users, informed by firsthand UX and accessibility observations, with deployment on Vercel and Cloudflare.

projects.name: AI Semiconductor Wafer Defect Detection System
bullets: Building deep learning pipeline to classify semiconductor wafer defects across 9 pattern classes using WM-811K dataset of 811K+ real wafer maps.
Implementing ensemble of ResNet50, EfficientNet-B3, and DenseNet121 with weighted soft voting and test-time augmentation for robust classification.
Addressing class imbalance using stratified sampling, class-weighted loss functions, and oversampling for rare defect patterns.
Targeting sub-500ms inference for integration into fab workflows to reduce yield loss.

projects.name: Loan Default Prediction Pipeline
bullets: Building end-to-end ML pipeline to predict loan defaults using XGBoost ensemble with hyperparameter tuning.
Applying SHAP explainability framework to identify top 5 risk drivers for interpretable credit decisions.
Performing feature engineering across 15+ financial features to improve model generalization.

projects.name: RAG API with FastAPI and ChromaDB
bullets: Built production-ready RAG API using FastAPI and ChromaDB for vector storage with Ollama for fully local LLM inference.
Implemented document embedding pipeline converting knowledge base into searchable vector representations.
Designed dynamic /add endpoint for real-time knowledge base updates without server restarts, tested via SwaggerUI.

projects.name: Real-Time Data Processing Pipeline with Kubernetes & Kafka
bullets: Built streaming data pipeline using Kubernetes, Kafka, and Neo4j to ingest and process NYC taxi trip data in real time.
Orchestrated 5 microservices with Minikube and Helm, using Kafka Connect to move data from topics into Neo4j.
Deployed ZooKeeper, Kafka, Neo4j, and connector services via Kubernetes YAML for a highly available data pipeline.

projects.name: Graph Data Processing System with Neo4j & Docker
bullets: Engineered Dockerized Neo4j environment to model millions of taxi trip relationships as a graph.
Implemented PageRank and BFS using Neo4j Graph Data Science for location importance and reachability.
Automated ETL with Python to load and transform 1M+ records into an optimized node-relationship schema.

projects.name: 6G Smart Manufacturing Quality & Efficiency Analysis
bullets: Built Random Forest model to classify manufacturing efficiency status with 97% test accuracy on 10K production records.
Performed ANOVA and hypothesis testing on 8 operational variables, identifying key drivers reducing defect rates by 15%.
Conducted regression analysis proving high-efficiency conditions decreased energy consumption by 12% with p < 0.01.

projects.name: Healthcare Analytics Dashboard for Diabetes Patients
bullets: Designed Tableau dashboard over 100K+ diabetic patient encounters from 130 US hospitals to explore readmission trends.
Cleaned and prepared 50+ clinical attributes in Python including diagnoses, medications, and utilization metrics.
Created 5 interactive views with filters and calculated fields to help stakeholders identify high-risk groups.

projects.name: Predicting User Age from Rating Patterns using ML
bullets: Collaborated with a 3-member team to build an ML pipeline predicting user age from 100K+ platform ratings.
Performed data cleaning, feature engineering, and model tuning reducing prediction error by 5-8%.
Delivered technical report summarizing methodology, evaluation metrics, and key insights for stakeholders.
